reason: The image shows a bathtub on wheels (Bathmobile) surrounded by a crowd, with a stadium in the background. While the attire of some people in suits and dresses is plausible for 1960, other outfits, such as jeans and casual shirts, appear more modern. The clear plastic tub also seems anachronistic for that period. The visible wheel and chrome construction of the 'Bathmobile' raise concerns about material and construction techniques being too modern. The style of the stadium lighting is also more modern.  The presence of those modern items makes it unlikely this image represents the 1960s accurately.
